SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration

Class StorageConfiguration

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration.StorageConfiguration
@Component @ConfigurationProperties(prefix="storage") public class StorageConfiguration extends Object
Configuration properties for server-side file storage.

Values are bound from properties with the storage prefix.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    StorageConfiguration.FilenameProperties
    Nested configuration group for filename generation/parsing.

  • Method Details

    • isApplicationHome

      public boolean isApplicationHome()
      Returns whether storage paths are resolved relative to the application home.
      Returns:
      true if application home is used; false otherwise.

    • setApplicationHome

      public void setApplicationHome(boolean applicationHome)
      Sets whether storage paths are resolved relative to the application home.
      Parameters:
      applicationHome - true to use application home; false otherwise.

    • getPath

      public String getPath()
      Returns the configured root storage path, if any.
      Returns:
      storage path.

    • setPath

      public void setPath(String path)
      Sets the configured root storage path.
      Parameters:
      path - storage path.
